text: Tonal linen dressing in earthy neutrals (butter yellow, pale olive, muted terracotta); asymmetric & handkerchief-hem skirts with godet silhouettes; boho-romantic aesthetic — prairie florals, fringe details, and scarf-as-accessory styling; Y2K revival — velour, metallics, low-rise cuts, and diamanté embellishment; sheer organza & mesh layering over slip dresses or simple tanks; utility-meets-luxury (cargo, khaki, funnel-neck outerwear styled with palazzo trousers); sleek wedge sandals and raffia flats replacing chunky platform styles
